project_types.display_name: Python 3.13+ Policy Analysis Platform (data + backend hybrid)

completed_steps.summary: Classified as multi-part: main (147 src, 190 test, 3143 tests, 13 subsystems) + frontend (80 src, 35 test, 9 screens).
Found 15 docs, 16 planning artifacts, 105 story files, 4 retros, 4 brainstorming sessions.
Python 3.13+, FastAPI, PyArrow, OpenFisca, scipy, Marimo. React 19, TS 5.9, Vite 7, Tailwind v4, Recharts.
Deep scan: 13 subsystems, 20+ API endpoints, 48 components, 9 screens, CI/CD pipeline.
Source tree with layer annotations for all subsystems and frontend hierarchy.
Dev guide: setup, quality checks, conventions, common tasks, CI/CD.
Integration: frontend-backend via typed API + Vite proxy, two-tier persistence.
Architecture: pedagogical structure, 6 patterns, 4 data flows, 10 subsystem refs.
Master index.md with Start Here flow, all sections linked.
MkDocs Material setup, VS Code tasks, build verified, serve verified at localhost:8100.
Workflow complete. 6 docs regenerated + MkDocs + 3 VS Code tasks added.

findings.project_classification: Multi-part: Python backend (147 src, 3143 tests, 13 subsystems) + React frontend (80 src, 9 screens). Phase 2 complete.
findings.technology_stack: Python 3.13+, FastAPI, PyArrow, OpenFisca, scipy, Marimo. React 19, TS 5.9, Vite 7, Tailwind v4, Recharts. MkDocs Material for docs.
findings.existing_docs: 15 docs in docs/, 135+ total artifacts across all categories.
